Our system is really easy to use. I like to say it is a 3 part system:
Go to www.newfiwholesale.com and log in using the “broker login” tab in the upper, right corner
Click on the icon to upload a new loan and follow the prompts
Once you upload the 3.2 file you will go to the “price loan” screen as prompted where you choose your program (you may lock at this point if you wish)
If you are not already inside the loan in our system then log into our system as shown above, click on the “pipeline” tab, and then click on your loan to bring it up in the system
Click on the “Loan Estimate” tab on the left and follow the prompts on the following screen. It will ask you to upload the following:
-1003 signed by LO only (not signed by borrower)
-Settlement Service Provider List (SSPL) that you can print out of your LOS system *
(*YOU MAY REQUEST DEFAULT FEES INSTEAD- UPLOAD THE ESCROW FEE SHEET/ SSPL AND SIMPLY ADD REQUESTING DEFAULT FEES)
3. Upload your full loan (Note: you don’t have to wait until our disclosures go out to upload the full file. Do it as soon as you want after you request disclosures)
Get into the loan in our system if you are not already there
Click on the “Initial Credit File” tab and upload your full file
We do not need ANY disclosures from you at this point. Only disclosure we need from you is an Anti-Steering if you are doing lender paid comp but we can PTD for it
